claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements provider-specific configuration isolation with boundary mutation detection and cross-checker validation, preventing drift between Claude, Codex, and custom provider assumptions.

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot uses git ls-files and filesystem walk to detect all project files, excluding standard directories like node_modules and .git
evidence.why: Provides the baseline for detecting any project mutations during evidence agent execution

evidence.summary: diffBoundarySnapshots compares before/after SHA-256 digests to detect added, modified, or deleted files
evidence.why: Enables detection of any agent-side project mutations even in non-git repos

evidence.summary: runDemandEvidenceDispatchRuntime captures boundary snapshot before spawning agents and allows writes only to output_dir
evidence.why: Establishes the clean baseline before any provider execution

evidence.summary: After agent execution, boundary snapshot diff detects any project mutations and reports BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers
evidence.why: Post-execution boundary validation prevents silent project mutations

evidence.summary: executionConfig normalizes provider-specific AI config, handling provider, model, agent_tool_profile, and provider-specific flags
evidence.why: Provider configuration isolation prevents cross-provider leakage

evidence.summary: buildProviderInvocation has separate code paths for Claude, Codex, and custom providers with provider-specific argument construction
evidence.why: Provider-specific invocation isolation prevents model drift

evidence.summary: Codex provider uses codex_sandbox, codex_approval, codex_model, and output file capture mode
evidence.why: Codex-specific configuration does not leak into Claude or custom paths

evidence.summary: Claude provider uses permission-mode, settings, tools, max_budget_usd, and session persistence flags
evidence.why: Claude-specific configuration is isolated from other providers

evidence.summary: Claude provider normalizes agent_tool_profile to research, full, or boundary based on availability and clears tool restriction flags
evidence.why: Tool profile normalization prevents provider-specific tool assumptions

evidence.summary: buildDemandEvidenceDispatchPlan execution_policy writes_business_code is false and agent_tool_profile controls boundary vs full tools
evidence.why: Default boundary profile prevents full tool access unless explicitly authorized

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROTOCOLS defines explorer, cross-checker, and verifier roles with separate objectives and result schemas
evidence.why: Evidence agent role separation prevents assumption promotion

evidence.summary: inspectEvidenceAgreement detects when agents recommend different actions (proceed vs block/clarify) and creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_CONFLICT blockers
evidence.why: Cross-checker disagreement is surfaced instead of being averaged away

evidence.summary: Codex dispatch test verifies provider isolation: codex_sandbox, codex_approval, and model config do not inherit Claude defaults
evidence.why: Test evidence confirms provider-specific configuration isolation

evidence.summary: Claude dispatch test verifies tool restriction flags are cleared and boundary enforcement relies on permission-mode and session persistence
evidence.why: Test evidence confirms Claude tool handling under harness boundary

evidence.summary: boundary blocks project file mutation test verifies that unexpected-project-write.txt triggers BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blocker
evidence.why: Test evidence confirms boundary violation detection works

evidence.summary: git-backed boundary test verifies untracked and gitignored mutations are detected and blocked
evidence.why: Test evidence confirms git-based boundary detection for untracked files

evidence.summary: agent conflict test verifies that cross-checker disagreement creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_CONFLICT blocker and keeps PRD readiness blocked
evidence.why: Test evidence confirms cross-checker conflict prevents assumption promotion

evidence.summary: sanitizeMissing filters out non-missing status items like 'no missing data' from missing arrays
evidence.why: Prevents false blockers when agents report completion status

evidence.summary: isNonMissingStatusItem filters positive completion statements and negative 'no missing' patterns
evidence.why: Distinguishes status reporting from actual missing evidence

evidence.summary: inspectAgentAdapterContract validates sandbox safety, budget enforcement, and custom adapter warnings
evidence.why: Provider contract validation prevents unsafe configuration drift

risks: Provider-specific model or sandbox configuration could be mis-specified in config.ai, causing silent behavior differences
Non-git repos may have slower boundary detection due to full filesystem walk
Custom provider commands could bypass boundary if they write directly to project files
Evidence agents could return false-positive project scope evidence without actual file paths

result.notes: Evidence dispatch implements provider isolation, boundary detection, and cross-checker validation. Tests confirm provider-specific configuration handling and mutation detection. System is ready for real Claude -p agent stress testing.
